title: Drone Pack
body:
# Drone Pack
This datapack adds drones in your life.


![Content of Drone Pack](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/zFbCfkXc/images/bae0411ad13ab7078d591add30d0734d54425aaa.png)


**Drones can help** you to explore territory and watch at the *players*.
## Dronepedia
**Dronepedia** is a book that will help you with this datapack. It will given you when you join world at first time.

![Dronepedia](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/zFbCfkXc/images/7d789653fb81712c115c671fbd7c78fc8b5bb335.png)


# Issues and Features
- This datapack requires Resource Pack
- For correct UI display required Fabulous graphics
- This pack causes Custom World Advice
- Drone can load chunks to fast, that can issues lags
- Not compatible with [OptiFine](https://optifine.net) and [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)

![Custom World Advice](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/zFbCfkXc/images/30864a3ab14d66eee982cf387b2a77bf7d02c4c7.png)


# For servers
Server owners can use `/scoreboard players set DisableBook drnp.settings 1` command if they dont wont Dronepedia to be given to new players
